name: deep-cuts-platform
description: Permanent Deep Cuts artist discovery, analytics and publishing platform.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-platform.mjs && node scripts/test-discovery.mjs && node scripts/test-analytics.mjs && node scripts/test-build-tracking.mjs && node scripts/test-worker.mjs && node scripts/test-sync-editions.mjs && node --check js/app.js && node --check js/analytics.js && node --check js/interactions.js && node --check js/reporting.js && node --check js/report.js && node --check worker/index.js
